positive: A minimalist, highly detailed line-art illustration of a mythical forest scene at twilight. The composition should feature a central, elegant silhouette of a stag emerging from stylized, winding roots and bioluminescent flora. Incorporate fine single-weight black line work (engraving style) filling the negative space. The style is modern botanical gothic, utilizing strong contrast between deep midnight blues, rich forest greens, and glowing gold accents emanating from the flora. The overall mood is serene yet mysterious. Perfect for a clean, high-resolution, circular apparel print. Central composition, symmetrical focus, vector quality.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, watercolor, painting, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, amateur drawing, text, signatures, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition
